recommendations.title: Trapped
recommendations.overview: A man gets stuck in an empty high rise without food, water or electricity.

recommendations.title: War of the Worlds: The Attack
recommendations.overview: Three young astronomers fight to survive a deadly Martian invasion.

recommendations.title: Black Box
recommendations.overview: Mathieu is a young and talented black box analyst on a mission to solve the reason behind the deadly crash of a brand new aircraft. Yet, when the case is closed by authorities, Mathieu cannot help but sense there is something wrong with the evidence.

recommendations.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
recommendations.overview: After an encounter with UFOs, an electricity linesman feels undeniably drawn to an isolated area in the wilderness where something spectacular is about to happen.

recommendations.title: The Current War
recommendations.overview: Electricity titans Thomas Edison and George Westinghouse compete to create a sustainable system and market it to the American people.

recommendations.title: Fingernails
recommendations.overview: Anna and Ryan have found true love together. It's been proven by a controversial test. There's just one problem: Anna still isn't sure. Then she meets Amir.

recommendations.title: The Unthinkable
recommendations.overview: Sweden faces a mysterious attack while Alex tries to reunite with his youth love, Anna.

recommendations.title: Out of Season
recommendations.overview: Mathieu lives in Paris, Alice in a small seaside resort in Western France. He is a famous actor, about to turn fifty. She is a piano teacher in her forties. They were in love fifteen years ago, then separated. Time has passed. They each went their wa

recommendations.title: Love Hurts
recommendations.overview: Family and friends try to sabotage the budding romance between a young upper class girl and a humble student.

recommendations.title: The Friends of Eddie Coyle
recommendations.overview: An aging hood is about to go back to prison. Hoping to escape his fate, he supplies information on stolen guns to the feds, while simultaneously supplying arms to his bank robbing chums.
